TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_yi-se-tan-paw, title = yi-se-tan-paw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/yi-se-tan-paw} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == yi-se-tan-pawšľäśĖĮŚĚ¶Ś†° nilaculan yi-se-tan-paw " nu tu-l-ci a kamu ńįstanbul (is'tanbu…ę) " u satabakiay nu tu-l-ci a tukay , u tatudungan tu sapilacul nu kanatal, lalangawan atu naemekan nu kitidaan . šľäśĖĮŚĚ¶Ś†°(ŚúüŤÄ≥ŚÖ∂Ť™ě:ńįstanbul (is'tanbu…ę) ) . Itini kueneng i tu-l-ci nu tipan tu amisan u pu-se-pu-lu-se a bayu' , tida i mal-mala abayu' atu lumeniay a bayu' nu teban , mulakuwit tu u-ya-ta-lu , sapilacul atu naemekan nu kitidaan tini i u-cu nu tapiingan , u lu nu tademaw nu cay mueneg namintini i ya-cu a tapiingan . u tademaw nuheni makaala tu 1440 a emang , u satabakiay nu ya-cu a tukay nu maluyaluyay , u cung-tung satabakiay a maminay nu cikiw saka nem a tabakiay a tukay . mamin nu tukay ku lala' sa 5,343 a pihuwang ku-li "2,063ing-li" matagab ku yi-se-tan -paw amilecad , wiynisa u kitidaan nu mikuwanay, atu kitakit nasacacayay a tu tabakiay a tukay . 21 a siki nuayawan mikututay makakutkut tu baluhay a nubaetu a canan nu mikasiay idaw ku kutay maadih , u kitidaan nu yi-se-tan-paw a subal matabal i si-yinnuayawan nu 7000 amihcaan idaw t uku tademaw tini amueneng . tini mueneng namakayni tu baluhay a baetu nu namilepacaw micapi tu waliay pahusu katukuh u-cu kyu tahekal ku sahaydihan a sapikawaw ; neknek sa macapi cay malebut, katukuh mucelak ku nanum manebneb ku hekal . tini mikutkut maadih nu ayawan , nu daduducan nu se-lay-se atademaw , pasu hu-li-ci-ya atademaw , nay i si-yin nu ayawan 6000 amihcaan nu sadikuday a maneknek ku eneng tini i sa-la-ci-li-aw . duma nu ya-cu , ayda i ka-te-ke-yi a kitidaan tahekal ku lala' macapi tu si-yin nuayawan 4000 a mihcaan a cacanan . tin adidi nu si-yin nu ayawan 1000 u huy-ni-ci akitodaan a mipaulusiya a kitidaan , nayi si-yin nu ayawan nu 680 amihcaan a patideng u kitidaan nu ci-ya-ke-tun a kitidaan . Si-yin-nuayawa 660 amihcaan , namakay mu-ciya-la nu si-la nunisawacuan a binacadan i pu-se-bu- lu-se a bayu' nu uy-cu nu tapiingan a patideng tu pay0can-tin , yi-se-tan-paw mutucek wiyni sa a malingatu . nisawacian atademaw nay I cin-ciyaw-wan-se a lay-se-a tademaw muneknek tini mueneg itepal patideng tu wiy a tukay , mucuduh tu baluhay a sapilacul tu sapacakat . pay-can-tin nay i 5 a siki malaliyun tu naemekan nika apuyu' makuwan tu nu pu-se . nika i pu-si anikalepacaw nadikudan u si-la kumakaalaay tini tukayan . nadikuda nuyni mala ya0tin mapulungay a mukelid tu ya-tin sakatu a kanatal nu ciy a kitidaan , nuayawan nu 355 a mihcaan sadikuday makaala tu masacacay . pay-can matenes mala cabay nu lu-ma , nay i si-yin 73 a mihcaan tatengan mala lu-ma a kanatal nu cay . . Yi-se-tan-paw tini i tu-l-ci nu tipan tu amisan a mal-mal-ta a kitidaan , u pala sa 5,343 a kuli "2063" ingli . ). pu-se-bu-lu-se a bayu' matulin tu mal-mala a bayu' atu ay-cin abayu , ina tukay pala u-cu "se-lay-se , pasu naemekan atu sapilacul nu kitidaan" atu ya-cu nu duma "an-na-tu-li-ya" . nu hekalay a minatu u cin-san-ciyaw micapi tu nuayawan nu pa-can-tin atu cin-se-tan-paw kitidaan nu subal , maluayaw tina tukay a palalacal. . mal-mala a bayu' , pu-se-pu-lu-se a bayu' atu cin-san ciyaw itiniaydaay a yi-se-tan-paw nu kitidaan a nikasasuala , yu malebut amihcaan sa u yi-se-tan-paw , imalebut amihcaan sa sapi pulu' tu makatalay , ayda sa ina tukay u tatelunan nu aaidangan . yi-se-tan-paw nu amisan matatulaka tu talakaw mikitalakaw tu timulay a dadipasan , nika idaw ku talakaw malakuwit ku 200 depah "660ing a depah" nika idaw i dadipasan u nasa danggayay misaemecay a malikakuay , mangaleb i pu-se-pu-lu-se a bayu'an nu amisan u lumeniay han tini masasuala . yi-se-tan-paw u eneng i wali na-tu-li-ya a masa danggayay nu pabawan , micapi tu huy-cu apala' atu u-ya a pala nu kasasuala . wiytiniay a masaputunay a kitidaan nu amisan u an-na-tu-li-ya musedal katukuh i mal-mala-a bayu' , tini atukay nu naemekan sisa kinapina idaw ku tabakiay a maninel , u sabaeketay pihacengay a ninel sa nai 1509 a mihcaan , nadikudan sa sitabakiay a laing malakuwit ku langat papeci , tawya 10,000 katuud ku mapatayay . 1999 amihcaan tini i yi-ce-mi-te a ninel 18.000 ku mapatayay , nuyda sa 1,000 atademaw tini i yi-se-tan-paw nu niyadu a kitidaan . yi-se-tan-paw abinawlan misuayaw tu ayaw mangaleb ku ninel sa mabiyalaw ku binawlan , maydih pakaedem tu yi-se-tan-pawmicunus tu tademaw milunguc misanga tu luma' akay cay paka puut tu mahiniay a nikalaecus . sakamu sa ku mikingkiway tu ninel 2023 amihcaan yi-se-tan-paw akay idaw ku 7.6 aninel sa u ninel akay malakuwit ku lasubu nu nemsep sa . 60.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == ji-s…ô-tan-paw**** nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ji-s…ô-tan-paw " nu tu-r~…ĺ- ¶i a kamu *stanbur~…ĺ (is Ē~ °tanbu*) " u satabakiaj nu tu-r~…ĺ- ¶i a tukaj , u tatuduŇčan tu sapir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ nu kanatar~…ĺ, r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu na…ôm…ôkan nu kitidaan . ****(****:*stanbur~…ĺ (is Ē~ °tanbu*) ) . itini ku…ôn…ôŇč i tu-r~…ĺ- ¶i nu tipan tu amisan u pu-s…ô-pu-r~…ĺu-s…ô a baju Ē~ ° , tida i mar~…ĺ-mar~…ĺa abaju Ē~ ° atu r~…ĺum…ôniaj a baju Ē~ ° nu t…ôban , mur~…ĺakuwit tu u-ja-ta-r~…ĺu , sapir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ atu na…ôm…ôkan nu kitidaan tini i u- ¶u nu tapiiŇčan , u r~…ĺu nu tad…ômaw nu ¶aj mu…ôn…ôg namintini i ja- ¶u a tapiiŇčan . u tad…ômaw nuńß…ôni makaar~…ĺa tu **** a …ômaŇč , u satabakiaj nu ja- ¶u a tukaj nu mar~…ĺujar~…ĺujaj , u ¶uŇč-tuŇč satabakiaj a maminaj nu ¶ikiw saka n…ôm a tabakiaj a tukaj . mamin nu tukaj ku r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° sa *,*** a pińßuwaŇč ku-r~…ĺi "*,***iŇč-r~…ĺi" matagab ku ji-s…ô-tan -paw amir~…ĺ…ô ¶ad , wijnisa u kitidaan nu mikuwanaj, atu kitakit nasa ¶a ¶ajaj a tu tabakiaj a tukaj . ** a siki nuajawan mikututaj makakutkut tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a nuba…ôtu a ¶anan nu mikasiaj idaw ku kutaj maadińß , u kitidaan nu ji-s…ô-tan-paw a subar~…ĺ matabar~…ĺ i si-jinnuajawan nu **** amińß ¶aan idaw t uku tad…ômaw tini amu…ôn…ôŇč . tini mu…ôn…ôŇč namakajni tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a ba…ôtu nu namir~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw mi ¶api tu war~…ĺiaj pańßusu katukuńß u- ¶u kju tańß…ôkar~…ĺ ku sańßajdińßan a sapikawaw ; n…ôkn…ôk sa ma ¶api ¶aj mar~…ĺ…ôbut, katukuńß mu ¶…ôr~…ĺak ku nanum man…ôbn…ôb ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ . tini mikutkut maadińß nu ajawan , nu dadudu ¶an nu s…ô-r~…ĺaj-s…ô atad…ômaw , pasu ńßu-r~…ĺi- ¶i-ja atad…ômaw , naj i si-jin nu ajawan **** amińß ¶aan nu sadikudaj a man…ôkn…ôk ku …ôn…ôŇč tini i sa-r~…ĺa- ¶i-r~…ĺi-aw . duma nu ja- ¶u , ajda i ka-t…ô-k…ô-ji a kitidaan tańß…ôkar~…ĺ ku r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ma ¶api tu si-jin nuajawan **** a mińß ¶aan a ¶a ¶anan . tin adidi nu si-jin nu ajawan **** u ńßuj-ni- ¶i akitodaan a mipaur~…ĺusija a kitidaan , naji si-jin nu ajawan nu *** amińß ¶aan a patid…ôŇč u kitidaan nu ¶i-ja-k…ô-tun a kitidaan . si-jin-nuajawa *** amińß ¶aan , namakaj mu- ¶ija-r~…ĺa nu si-r~…ĺa nunisawa ¶uan a bina ¶adan i pu-s…ô-bu- r~…ĺu-s…ô a baju Ē~ ° nu uj- ¶u nu tapiiŇčan a patid…ôŇč tu paj* ¶an-tin , ji-s…ô-tan-paw mutu ¶…ôk wijni sa a mar~…ĺiŇčatu . nisawa ¶ian atad…ômaw naj i ¶in- ¶ijaw-wan-s…ô a r~…ĺaj-s…ô-a tad…ômaw mun…ôkn…ôk tini mu…ôn…ôg it…ôpar~…ĺ patid…ôŇč tu wij a tukaj , mu ¶uduńß tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a sapir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ tu sapa ¶akat . paj- ¶an-tin naj i * a siki mar~…ĺar~…ĺijun tu na…ôm…ôkan nika apuju Ē~ ° makuwan tu nu pu-s…ô . nika i pu-si anikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw nadikudan u si-r~…ĺa kumakaar~…ĺaaj tini tukajan . nadikuda nujni mar~…ĺa ja*tin mapur~…ĺuŇčaj a muk…ôr~…ĺid tu ja-tin sakatu a kanatar~…ĺ nu ¶ij a kitidaan , nuajawan nu *** a mińß ¶aan sadikudaj makaar~…ĺa tu masa ¶a ¶aj . paj- ¶an mat…ôn…ôs mar~…ĺa ¶abaj nu r~…ĺu-ma , naj i si-jin ** a mińß ¶aan tat…ôŇčan mar~…ĺa r~…ĺu-ma a kanatar~…ĺ nu ¶aj . . ji-s…ô-tan-paw tini i tu-r~…ĺ- ¶i nu tipan tu amisan a mar~…ĺ-mar~…ĺ-ta a kitidaan , u par~…ĺa sa *,*** a kur~…ĺi "****" iŇčr~…ĺi . ). pu-s…ô-bu-r~…ĺu-s…ô a baju Ē~ ° matur~…ĺin tu mar~…ĺ-mar~…ĺa a baju Ē~ ° atu aj- ¶in abaju , ina tukaj par~…ĺa u- ¶u "s…ô-r~…ĺaj-s…ô , pasu na…ôm…ôkan atu sapir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ nu kitidaan" atu ja- ¶u nu duma "an-na-tu-r~…ĺi-ja" . nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a minatu u ¶in-san- ¶ijaw mi ¶api tu nuajawan nu pa- ¶an-tin atu ¶in-s…ô-tan-paw kitidaan nu subar~…ĺ , mar~…ĺuajaw tina tukaj a par~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶ar~…ĺ. . mar~…ĺ-mar~…ĺa a baju Ē~ ° , pu-s…ô-pu-r~…ĺu-s…ô a baju Ē~ ° atu ¶in-san ¶ijaw itiniajdaaj a ji-s…ô-tan-paw nu kitidaan a nikasasuar~…ĺa , ju mar~…ĺ…ôbut amińß ¶aan sa u ji-s…ô-tan-paw , imar~…ĺ…ôbut amińß ¶aan sa sapi pur~…ĺu Ē~ ° tu makatar~…ĺaj , ajda sa ina tukaj u tat…ôr~…ĺunan nu aaidaŇčan . ji-s…ô-tan-paw nu amisan matatur~…ĺaka tu tar~…ĺakaw mikitar~…ĺakaw tu timur~…ĺaj a dadipasan , nika idaw ku tar~…ĺakaw mar~…ĺakuwit ku *** d…ôpańß "***iŇč a d…ôpańß" nika idaw i dadipasan u nasa daŇčgajaj misa…ôm…ô ¶aj a mar~…ĺikakuaj , maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb i pu-s…ô-pu-r~…ĺu-s…ô a baju Ē~ °an nu amisan u r~…ĺum…ôniaj ńßan tini masasuar~…ĺa . ji-s…ô-tan-paw u …ôn…ôŇč i war~…ĺi na-tu-r~…ĺi-ja a masa daŇčgajaj nu pabawan , mi ¶api tu ńßuj- ¶u apar~…ĺa Ē~ ° atu u-ja a par~…ĺa nu kasasuar~…ĺa . wijtiniaj a masaputunaj a kitidaan nu amisan u an-na-tu-r~…ĺi-ja mus…ôdar~…ĺ katukuńß i mar~…ĺ-mar~…ĺa-a baju Ē~ ° , tini atukaj nu na…ôm…ôkan sisa kinapina idaw ku tabakiaj a manin…ôr~…ĺ , u saba…ôk…ôtaj pińßa ¶…ôŇčaj a nin…ôr~…ĺ sa nai **** a mińß ¶aan , nadikudan sa sitabakiaj a r~…ĺaiŇč mar~…ĺakuwit ku r~…ĺaŇčat pap…ô ¶i , tawja **,*** katuud ku mapatajaj . **** amińß ¶aan tini i ji- ¶…ô-mi-t…ô a nin…ôr~…ĺ **.*** ku mapatajaj , nujda sa *,*** atad…ômaw tini i ji-s…ô-tan-paw nu nijadu a kitidaan . ji-s…ô-tan-paw abinawr~…ĺan misuajaw tu ajaw maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb ku nin…ôr~…ĺ sa mabijar~…ĺaw ku binawr~…ĺan , majdińß paka…ôd…ôm tu ji-s…ô-tan-pawmi ¶unus tu tad…ômaw mir~…ĺuŇču ¶ misaŇča tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° akaj ¶aj paka puut tu mańßiniaj a nikar~…ĺa…ô ¶us . sakamu sa ku mikiŇčkiwaj tu nin…ôr~…ĺ **** amińß ¶aan ji-s…ô-tan-paw akaj idaw ku *.* anin…ôr~…ĺ sa u nin…ôr~…ĺ akaj mar~…ĺakuwit ku r~…ĺasubu nu n…ôms…ôp sa . **.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == yi-se-tan-pawšľäśĖĮŚĚ¶Ś†° nilaculan yi-se-tan-paw " nu tu-l-ci a kamu ńįstanbul (is'tanbu…ę) " u satabakiay nu tu-l-ci a tukay , u tatudungan tu sapilacul nu kanatal, lalangawan atu naemekan nu kitidaan . šľäśĖĮŚĚ¶Ś†°(ŚúüŤÄ≥ŚÖ∂Ť™ě:ńįstanbul (is'tanbu…ę) ) . Itini kueneng i tu-l-ci nu tipan tu amisan u pu-se-pu-lu-se a bayu' , tida i mal-mala abayu' atu lumeniay a bayu' nu teban , mulakuwit tu u-ya-ta-lu , sapilacul atu naemekan nu kitidaan tini i u-cu nu tapiingan , u lu nu tademaw nu cay mueneg namintini i ya-cu a tapiingan . u tademaw nuheni makaala tu 1440 a emang , u satabakiay nu ya-cu a tukay nu maluyaluyay , u cung-tung satabakiay a maminay nu cikiw saka nem a tabakiay a tukay . mamin nu tukay ku lala' sa 5,343 a pihuwang ku-li "2,063ing-li" matagab ku yi-se-tan -paw amilecad , wiynisa u kitidaan nu mikuwanay, atu kitakit nasacacayay a tu tabakiay a tukay . 21 a siki nuayawan mikututay makakutkut tu baluhay a nubaetu a canan nu mikasiay idaw ku kutay maadih , u kitidaan nu yi-se-tan-paw a subal matabal i si-yinnuayawan nu 7000 amihcaan idaw t uku tademaw tini amueneng . tini mueneng namakayni tu baluhay a baetu nu namilepacaw micapi tu waliay pahusu katukuh u-cu kyu tahekal ku sahaydihan a sapikawaw ; neknek sa macapi cay malebut, katukuh mucelak ku nanum manebneb ku hekal . tini mikutkut maadih nu ayawan , nu daduducan nu se-lay-se atademaw , pasu hu-li-ci-ya atademaw , nay i si-yin nu ayawan 6000 amihcaan nu sadikuday a maneknek ku eneng tini i sa-la-ci-li-aw . duma nu ya-cu , ayda i ka-te-ke-yi a kitidaan tahekal ku lala' macapi tu si-yin nuayawan 4000 a mihcaan a cacanan . tin adidi nu si-yin nu ayawan 1000 u huy-ni-ci akitodaan a mipaulusiya a kitidaan , nayi si-yin nu ayawan nu 680 amihcaan a patideng u kitidaan nu ci-ya-ke-tun a kitidaan . Si-yin-nuayawa 660 amihcaan , namakay mu-ciya-la nu si-la nunisawacuan a binacadan i pu-se-bu- lu-se a bayu' nu uy-cu nu tapiingan a patideng tu pay0can-tin , yi-se-tan-paw mutucek wiyni sa a malingatu . nisawacian atademaw nay I cin-ciyaw-wan-se a lay-se-a tademaw muneknek tini mueneg itepal patideng tu wiy a tukay , mucuduh tu baluhay a sapilacul tu sapacakat . pay-can-tin nay i 5 a siki malaliyun tu naemekan nika apuyu' makuwan tu nu pu-se . nika i pu-si anikalepacaw nadikudan u si-la kumakaalaay tini tukayan . nadikuda nuyni mala ya0tin mapulungay a mukelid tu ya-tin sakatu a kanatal nu ciy a kitidaan , nuayawan nu 355 a mihcaan sadikuday makaala tu masacacay . pay-can matenes mala cabay nu lu-ma , nay i si-yin 73 a mihcaan tatengan mala lu-ma a kanatal nu cay . . Yi-se-tan-paw tini i tu-l-ci nu tipan tu amisan a mal-mal-ta a kitidaan , u pala sa 5,343 a kuli "2063" ingli . ). pu-se-bu-lu-se a bayu' matulin tu mal-mala a bayu' atu ay-cin abayu , ina tukay pala u-cu "se-lay-se , pasu naemekan atu sapilacul nu kitidaan" atu ya-cu nu duma "an-na-tu-li-ya" . nu hekalay a minatu u cin-san-ciyaw micapi tu nuayawan nu pa-can-tin atu cin-se-tan-paw kitidaan nu subal , maluayaw tina tukay a palalacal. . mal-mala a bayu' , pu-se-pu-lu-se a bayu' atu cin-san ciyaw itiniaydaay a yi-se-tan-paw nu kitidaan a nikasasuala , yu malebut amihcaan sa u yi-se-tan-paw , imalebut amihcaan sa sapi pulu' tu makatalay , ayda sa ina tukay u tatelunan nu aaidangan . yi-se-tan-paw nu amisan matatulaka tu talakaw mikitalakaw tu timulay a dadipasan , nika idaw ku talakaw malakuwit ku 200 depah "660ing a depah" nika idaw i dadipasan u nasa danggayay misaemecay a malikakuay , mangaleb i pu-se-pu-lu-se a bayu'an nu amisan u lumeniay han tini masasuala . yi-se-tan-paw u eneng i wali na-tu-li-ya a masa danggayay nu pabawan , micapi tu huy-cu apala' atu u-ya a pala nu kasasuala . wiytiniay a masaputunay a kitidaan nu amisan u an-na-tu-li-ya musedal katukuh i mal-mala-a bayu' , tini atukay nu naemekan sisa kinapina idaw ku tabakiay a maninel , u sabaeketay pihacengay a ninel sa nai 1509 a mihcaan , nadikudan sa sitabakiay a laing malakuwit ku langat papeci , tawya 10,000 katuud ku mapatayay . 1999 amihcaan tini i yi-ce-mi-te a ninel 18.000 ku mapatayay , nuyda sa 1,000 atademaw tini i yi-se-tan-paw nu niyadu a kitidaan . yi-se-tan-paw abinawlan misuayaw tu ayaw mangaleb ku ninel sa mabiyalaw ku binawlan , maydih pakaedem tu yi-se-tan-pawmicunus tu tademaw milunguc misanga tu luma' akay cay paka puut tu mahiniay a nikalaecus . sakamu sa ku mikingkiway tu ninel 2023 amihcaan yi-se-tan-paw akay idaw ku 7.6 aninel sa u ninel akay malakuwit ku lasubu nu nemsep sa . 60.

mu…ôn…ôg namintini i ja- ¶u a tapiiŇčan . u tad…ômaw nuńß…ôni makaar~…ĺa tu **** a …ômaŇč , u satabakiaj nu ja- ¶u a tukaj nu mar~…ĺujar~…ĺujaj , u ¶uŇč-tuŇč satabakiaj a maminaj nu ¶ikiw saka n…ôm a tabakiaj a tukaj . mamin nu tukaj ku r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° sa *,*** a pińßuwaŇč ku-r~…ĺi "*,***iŇč-r~…ĺi" matagab ku ji-s…ô-tan -paw amir~…ĺ…ô ¶ad , wijnisa u kitidaan nu mikuwanaj, atu kitakit nasa ¶a ¶ajaj a tu tabakiaj a tukaj . ** a siki nuajawan mikututaj makakutkut tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a nuba…ôtu a ¶anan nu mikasiaj idaw ku kutaj maadińß , u kitidaan nu ji-s…ô-tan-paw a subar~…ĺ matabar~…ĺ i si-jinnuajawan nu **** amińß ¶aan idaw t uku tad…ômaw tini amu…ôn…ôŇč . tini mu…ôn…ôŇč namakajni tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a ba…ôtu nu namir~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw mi ¶api tu war~…ĺiaj pańßusu katukuńß u- ¶u kju tańß…ôkar~…ĺ ku sańßajdińßan a sapikawaw ; n…ôkn…ôk sa ma ¶api ¶aj mar~…ĺ…ôbut, katukuńß mu ¶…ôr~…ĺak ku nanum man…ôbn…ôb ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ . tini mikutkut maadińß nu ajawan , nu dadudu ¶an nu s…ô-r~…ĺaj-s…ô atad…ômaw , pasu ńßu-r~…ĺi- ¶i-ja atad…ômaw , naj i si-jin nu ajawan **** amińß ¶aan nu sadikudaj a man…ôkn…ôk ku …ôn…ôŇč tini i sa-r~…ĺa- ¶i-r~…ĺi-aw . duma nu ja- ¶u , ajda i ka-t…ô-k…ô-ji a kitidaan tańß…ôkar~…ĺ ku r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ma ¶api tu si-jin nuajawan **** a mińß ¶aan a ¶a ¶anan . tin adidi nu si-jin nu ajawan **** u ńßuj-ni- ¶i akitodaan a mipaur~…ĺusija a kitidaan , naji si-jin nu ajawan nu *** amińß ¶aan a patid…ôŇč u kitidaan nu ¶i-ja-k…ô-tun a kitidaan . si-jin-nuajawa *** amińß ¶aan , namakaj mu- ¶ija-r~…ĺa nu si-r~…ĺa nunisawa ¶uan a bina ¶adan i pu-s…ô-bu- r~…ĺu-s…ô a baju Ē~ ° nu uj- ¶u nu tapiiŇčan a patid…ôŇč tu paj* ¶an-tin , ji-s…ô-tan-paw mutu ¶…ôk wijni sa a mar~…ĺiŇčatu . nisawa ¶ian atad…ômaw naj i ¶in- ¶ijaw-wan-s…ô a r~…ĺaj-s…ô-a tad…ômaw mun…ôkn…ôk tini mu…ôn…ôg it…ôpar~…ĺ patid…ôŇč tu wij a tukaj , mu ¶uduńß tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a sapir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ tu sapa ¶akat . paj- ¶an-tin naj i * a siki mar~…ĺar~…ĺijun tu na…ôm…ôkan nika apuju Ē~ ° makuwan tu nu pu-s…ô . nika i pu-si anikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw nadikudan u si-r~…ĺa kumakaar~…ĺaaj tini tukajan . nadikuda nujni mar~…ĺa ja*tin mapur~…ĺuŇčaj a muk…ôr~…ĺid tu ja-tin sakatu a kanatar~…ĺ nu ¶ij a kitidaan , nuajawan nu *** a mińß ¶aan sadikudaj makaar~…ĺa tu masa ¶a ¶aj . paj- ¶an mat…ôn…ôs mar~…ĺa ¶abaj nu r~…ĺu-ma , naj i si-jin ** a mińß ¶aan tat…ôŇčan mar~…ĺa r~…ĺu-ma a kanatar~…ĺ nu ¶aj . . ji-s…ô-tan-paw tini i tu-r~…ĺ- ¶i nu tipan tu amisan a mar~…ĺ-mar~…ĺ-ta a kitidaan , u par~…ĺa sa *,*** a kur~…ĺi "****" iŇčr~…ĺi . ). pu-s…ô-bu-r~…ĺu-s…ô a baju Ē~ ° matur~…ĺin tu minatu u ¶in-san- ¶ijaw mi ¶api tu nuajawan nu pa- ¶an-tin atu ¶in-s…ô-tan-paw kitidaan nu subar~…ĺ , mar~…ĺuajaw tina tukaj a par~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶ar~…ĺ. . mar~…ĺ-mar~…ĺa a baju Ē~ ° , pu-s…ô-pu-r~…ĺu-s…ô a ajda sa ina tukaj u tat…ôr~…ĺunan nu aaidaŇčan . ji-s…ô-tan-paw nu amisan matatur~…ĺaka tu tar~…ĺakaw mikitar~…ĺakaw tu timur~…ĺaj a dadipasan , nika idaw ku tar~…ĺakaw mar~…ĺakuwit ku *** d…ôpańß "***iŇč a d…ôpańß" nika idaw i dadipasan u nasa daŇčgajaj misa…ôm…ô ¶aj a mar~…ĺikakuaj , maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb i pu-s…ô-pu-r~…ĺu-s…ô a baju Ē~ °an nu amisan u r~…ĺum…ôniaj ńßan tini masasuar~…ĺa . ji-s…ô-tan-paw u …ôn…ôŇč i war~…ĺi na-tu-r~…ĺi-ja a masa daŇčgajaj nu pabawan , mi ¶api tu ńßuj- ¶u apar~…ĺa Ē~ ° atu u-ja a par~…ĺa nu kasasuar~…ĺa . wijtiniaj a masaputunaj a kitidaan nu amisan u
